package WurstExportedObjects_w3u
import ObjEditingNatives
import UnitObjEditing

// Modified Table (contains all custom objects)

@compiletime function create_w3u_hchs()
	new UnitDefinition('hchs', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Hero Chooser")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E000()
	new HeroDefinition('E000', 'Ewar')
	..setTeamColor(0)
	..setNormalAbilities("AInv,Ault")
	..setAbilitySkinList("AInv,Ault")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n000()
	new UnitDefinition('n000', 'nkob')
	..setAttack1AnimationBackswingPoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1AnimationDamagePoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1CooldownTime(0.0)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(0)
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(0)
	..setAttack1DamageSidesperDie(0)
	..setAttack1MaximumNumberofTargets(0)
	..setAttack1Range(0)
	..setAttack1RangeMotionBuffer(0.0)
	..setAttack2MaximumNumberofTargets(0)
	..setAttacksEnabled(0)
	..setSpeedBase(0)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(20000)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(3.0)
	..setName("KoboldThemedTargetDummy")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n001()
	new UnitDefinition('n001', 'nech')
	..setSpeedBase(0)
	..setSpeedMinimum(0)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(500.0)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(20000)
	..setName("ChickenThemedTargetDummy")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E001()
	new HeroDefinition('E001', 'Ecen')
	..setHeroAbilities("")
	..setName("Cenarius")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setString("uhas", "")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n002()
	new UnitDefinition('n002', 'nfac')
	..setName("Goblin Factory")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e002()
	new UnitDefinition('e002', 'efon')
	..setNormalAbilities("A000,Ault")
	..setUpgradesUsed("R003,R000,Reuv,Renb")
	..setFoodCost(2)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(525)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(1.0)
	..setAttack1CooldownTime(1.45)
	..setSpeedBase(240)
	..setGoldCost(130)
	..setBuildTime(3)
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Treant")
	..setTooltipExtended("Basic frontline unit. Can learn Thicker Bark to resist some damage and Recycle to invigorate a nearby unit on death. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setHotkey("Q")
	..setAbilitySkinList("A000,Ault")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0t,AM0u,Ault")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E003()
	new HeroDefinition('E003', 'Edem')
	..setHeroAbilities("A002")
	..setAttack1WeaponSound("RockHeavyBash")
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(3.0)
	..setPrimaryAttribute("STR")
	..setStartingStrength(25)
	..setStrengthPerLevel(4.0)
	..setIntelligencePerLevel(1.7)
	..setAgilityPerLevel(2.0)
	..setStartingAgility(18)
	..setBuildTime(5)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setGoldCost(50)
	..setName("Ursoc")
	..setModelFile("units\\creeps\\GrizzlyBear\\GrizzlyBear.mdl")
	..setTintingColorRed(120)
	..setTintingColorGreen(120)
	..setTintingColorBlue(120)
	..setProperNames("Ursoc")
	..setTooltipAwaken("Revive Ursoc")
	..setTooltipBasic("Summon Ursoc")
	..setTooltipExtended("Ancient Wild God of the forest, Ursoc is a relentless warrior who crushes his enemies with overwhelming strength and primal fury. Has Cleave, [Spell], [Spell][Spell], and [Ultimate]. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setTooltipRevive("Revive Ursoc")
	..setIconScoreScreen("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNGrizzlyBear.blp")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNGrizzlyBear.blp")
	..setProperNamesUsed(1)
	..setNormalAbilities("A001,AInv,Ault")
	..setHeroAbilities("AM0l,A002,AM0k,AHav")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e004()
	new UnitDefinition('e004', 'edry')
	..setManaInitialAmount(150)
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)
	..setManaMaximum(250)
	..setBuildTime(4)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(20)
	..setManaRegeneration(1.25)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(615)
	..setNormalAbilities("Ahea,Aadm,Amim,Aspo,Aien,Ault")
	..setAttack1AttackType("magic")
	..setSpeedBase(340)
	..setGoldCost(45)
	..setName("Dryad Caster")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\SylvanEnchantress.mdl")
	..setIconGameInterface("war3mapImported\\BTNSylvanEnchantress.blp")
	..setAbilitySkinList("Ahea,Aadm,Amim,Aspo,Aien,Ault")
	..setTooltipExtended("Spellcaster that has a poison attack which slows and damages enemy units. Also has Spell Immunity which renders her invulnerable to magical effects and damage. Can learn Abolish Magic and Spirit Wisps. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Dryad Caster")
	..setAttack1ProjectileArt("Abilities\\Weapons\\KeeperGroveMissile\\KeeperGroveMissile.mdl")
	..setButtonPositionX(2)
	..setHotkey("C")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0o,AInv,Ault,ACm2,Aien,Aadm,Aspo")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e005()
	new BuildingDefinition('e005', 'edob')
	..setResearchesAvailable("")
	..setRequirements("e00M,nbwd")
	..setUnitsTrained("nssn,nwat")
	..setGoldCost(60)
	..setName("Sentinel Embassy")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETownhall.mdl")
	..setTooltipBasic("Create Sentinel Embassy")
	..setTooltipExtended("Trains the Warden and Cleric units")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNNightElfFishingVillage.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n003()
	new BuildingDefinition('n003', 'nfoh')
	..setName("Fountain of Blood")
	..setTintingColorGreen(50)
	..setTintingColorBlue(50)


@compiletime function create_w3u_o000()
	new BuildingDefinition('o000', 'owtw')
	..setName("GoblinTower")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinTowerInduwer.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_o001()
	new BuildingDefinition('o001', 'obar')
	..setName("GoblinBarracks")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinBarracks.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_o002()
	new BuildingDefinition('o002', 'ogre')
	..setName("GoblinTownhall")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinOutpost.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h000()
	new BuildingDefinition('h000', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Mount Hyjal")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")
	..setModelFile("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h001()
	new BuildingDefinition('h001', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Mount Hyjal Grove")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")

	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")

	new BuildingDefinition('e009', 'edob')
	..setRequirements("e00H")
	..setName("Sanctuary1")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NightElf_SanctuaryV1.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00C()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00C', 'edob')
	..setResearchesAvailable("")
	..setRequirements("e00N")
	..setUnitsTrained("n00A,e00P")
	..setGoldCost(80)
	..setName("Hall of Champions")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NightElf_Haven.mdl")
	..setTooltipBasic("Create Hall of Champions")
	..setTooltipExtended("Trains the most prestigous units available to the sentinels in the Vault Guardians and Elite Archers")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNNightElfCaptureFlag.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00G()

	..setRequirements("e009")
	..setResearchesAvailable("")
	..setName("Sanctuary2")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NightElf_SanctuaryV2.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00A()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00A', 'emow')
	..setBuildTime(15)
	..setGoldCost(45)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setName("House")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NightElf_TowerV1.mdl")
	..setTooltipBasic("Create House")
	..setTooltipExtended("Provides food, which increases the maximum number of units that can be trained.")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNElvenFarm.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00D()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00D', 'eate')
	..setName("Altar")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\HighElfAltar.mdl")

	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNHumanWatchTower.blp")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00B()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00B', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("e00I")
	..setName("TowerTest")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00I()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00I', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("e00F")
	..setName("TowerTest1")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")
	..setRequiredAnimationNames("upgrade,first")

	new BuildingDefinition('e00F', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("")
	..setName("TowerTest2")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")
	..setRequiredAnimationNames("upgrade,second")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00E()
	new UnitDefinition('e00E', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Explosives")
	..setModelFile("Units\\Other\\TNTBarrel\\TNTBarrel.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_N006()
	new HeroDefinition('N006', 'Nmsr')
	..setHeroAbilities("")
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(4000)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(4.0)
	..setManaRegeneration(7.0)
	..setManaMaximum(1000)
	..setLevel(10)
	..setStartingIntelligence(29)
	..setStartingStrength(26)
	..setStartingAgility(15)
	..setIntelligencePerLevel(5.2)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(10)
	..setStrengthPerLevel(3.0)
	..setCanFlee(false)
	..setName("Xavius")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setString("uhas", "")
	..setProperNames("Xavius the Nightmare Lord")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM05,AM06,AM03")
	..setLevel(6)
	..setName("Xavius")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00J()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00J', 'eshy')
	..setScalingValue(2.0)


@compiletime function create_w3u_n004()
	new UnitDefinition('n004', 'nowb')
	..setManaInitialAmount(200)
	..setManaRegeneration(1.0)
	..setBuildTime(15)
	..setFoodCost(4)
	..setNormalAbilities("A004")
	..setManaMaximum(400)
	..setRace("nightelf")
	..setAttack1Range(600)
	..setAttack1ProjectileSpeed(1300)
	..setAttack1ProjectileHomingEnabled(true)
	..setAttack1WeaponType("missile")
	..setAttack1WeaponSound("")
	..setAcquisitionRange(600.0)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(700)
	..setAttack1TargetsAllowed("air,debris,ground,item,structure,ward")
	..setAttack1DamageBase(39)
	..setRequirements("etoe,R006")
	..setAttack1AttackType("magic")
	..setSleeps(false)
	..setName("Moonkin")
	..setAttack1ProjectileArt("Abilities\\Weapons\\FarseerMissile\\FarseerMissile.mdl")
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Moonkin")
	..setTooltipExtended("Moonkin are wild experts of the arcane arts providing Brilliance Aura and can cast Arcane Blast doing massive aoe damage. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM09,AM0q")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00K()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00K', 'edob')
	..setUnitsTrained("earc,e00R,ebal")
	..setResearchesAvailable("Reib,Remk,R008")
	..setRequirements("")
	..setGoldCost(50)
	..setName("Sentinel's Hall")
	..setTooltipBasic("Create Sentinel's Hall")
	..setTooltipExtended("Trains Archers, Huntresses and Glaive Throwers")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n007()
	new UnitDefinition('n007', 'nchg')
	..setSpeedBase(522)
	..setSpeedMaximum(522)
	..setTurnRate(3.0)
	..setSpeedMinimum(522)
	..setCollisionSize(1.0)
	..setTargetedAs("none")
	..setName("DummyOrc")

	new UnitDefinition('e00L', 'enec')
	..setNormalAbilities("Ault,Arep")
	..setStructuresBuilt("nbwd,e008,e00U,e00C,e00M,e005,e00K,e00O,e00A")

	..setSpeedBase(280)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(210)
	..setFoodCost(1)

	..setAbilitySkinList("Ault")

	..setLumberCost(0)

	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNArcaneObservatory.blp")

	..setUnitsSold("e00L")

@compiletime function create_w3u_n008()
	new UnitDefinition('n008', 'nwlg')
	..setAttack1DamageBase(27)
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(2)
	..setAttack1Range(100)
	..setSpeedBase(360)
	..setBuildTime(5)
	..setGoldCost(50)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setSightRadiusNight(1100)
	..setUpgradesUsed("R00A,R009,Rema,Reuv")
	..setNormalAbilities("A00D,A00B,Ault,ACev,ACct")
	..setRace("nightelf")
	..setSleeps(false)
	..setCollisionSize(32.0)
	..setDefenseBase(7)
	..setRequirements("e00H")
	..setName("Nightsaber")
	..setIconGameInterface("war3mapImported\\BTNPanther.blp")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\Panther.mdl")
	..setScalingValue(1.0)
	..setSelectionScale(2.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Nightsaber")
	..setTooltipExtended("Medium melee unit with Critical Strike, Evasion and Prowl. Able to learn pick up huntress. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setHotkey("Q")

	..setHotkey("W")
	..setButtonPositionX(1)
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0v")

@compiletime function create_w3u_n00A()
	new UnitDefinition('n00A', 'nssn')
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(3)
	..setAttack1Range(100)
	..setAttack1TargetsAllowed("debris,ground,item,structure,ward")
	..setAttack1WeaponType("normal")
	..setAttack1DamageBase(18)
	..setCollisionSize(16.0)
	..setSpeedBase(320)
	..setBuildTime(7)
	..setGoldCost(60)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setAttack1AttackType("normal")
	..setTeamColor(24)
	..setDefenseBase(6)
	..setArmorType("hero")
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(600)
	..setNormalAbilities("A009,ACev,A006,ACss")
	..setRequirements("e00N")
	..setManaRegeneration(0.8)
	..setManaMaximum(300)
	..setManaInitialAmount(100)
	..setUpgradesUsed("R008,R009,Rema")
	..setLevel(4)
	..setName("Vault Guardians")
	..setModelFile("units\\nightelf\\herowarden\\herowarden.mdl")
	..setScalingValue(0.8)
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Vault Guardians")
	..setTooltipExtended("These elite wardens previously stood at the side of Maiev they're strong and evasive frontliners. Possesing Shadow Strike, Blink, Evasion and Critical Strike. n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setHotkey("Q")

@compiletime function create_w3u_x001()
	new UnitDefinition('x001', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Dummy Caster")
	..setManaMaximum(1000000)
	..setMovementType("fly")
	..setUpgradesUsed("")
	..setStructuresBuilt("")
	..setRace("commoner")
	..setFoodCost(0)
	..setArmorType("divine")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNtemp.blp")
	..setSpeedBase(522)
	..setModelFile("dummy.mdl")
	..setAnimationBlendTimeseconds(0.0)
	..setAnimationCastBackswing(0.0)
	..setMaximumPitchAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setMaximumRollAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setTurnRate(3.0)
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setProjectileImpactZ(0.0)
	..setProjectileLaunchZ(0.0)
	..setNameEditorSuffix("(Basics)")
	..setSightRadiusDay(1)
	..setSightRadiusNight(1)
	..setUnitClassification("_")
	..setPropulsionWindowdegrees(1.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("")
	..setNormalAbilities("Aloc,Agho")
	..setCollisionSize(0.0)


@compiletime function create_w3u_x002()
	new UnitDefinition('x002', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Effect Dummy Unit")
	..setUpgradesUsed("")
	..setStructuresBuilt("")
	..setManaRegeneration(0.1)
	..setManaInitialAmount(1000)
	..setManaMaximum(1000)
	..setCollisionSize(0.0)
	..setRace("commoner")
	..setFoodCost(0)
	..setArmorType("divine")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNTemp.blp")
	..setSpeedBase(522)
	..setModelFile("dummy.mdl")
	..setAnimationBlendTimeseconds(0.0)
	..setAnimationCastBackswing(0.0)
	..setMaximumPitchAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setMaximumRollAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setProjectileImpactZ(0.0)
	..setProjectileLaunchZ(0.0)
	..setNameEditorSuffix("(Basics)")
	..setSightRadiusDay(1)
	..setSightRadiusNight(1)
	..setUnitClassification("_")
	..setPropulsionWindowdegrees(1.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("")
	..setAttacksEnabled(1)
	..setAttack1AnimationBackswingPoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1AnimationDamagePoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1CooldownTime(0.0)
	..setAttack1AttackType("unknown")
	..setAttack1DamageBase(-1)
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(1)
	..setAttack1DamageSidesperDie(1)
	..setAttack1ProjectileSpeed(2147483647)
	..setAttack1Range(2147483647)
	..setAttack1TargetsAllowed("air,debris,ground,invulnerable,item,structure,vulnerable,ward")
	..setAttack1WeaponSound("Nothing")
	..setAttack1WeaponType("instant")
	..setAcquisitionRange(2.1474836E9)
	..setNormalAbilities("Avul,Aloc,AM08")

	new UnitDefinition('x003', 'ewsp')
	..setFoodCost(0)
	..setCollisionSize(0.0)
	..setModelFile("dummy.mdl")

// These are emitted when createObjectDefinition uses the same base/new id.

@compiletime function create_w3u_hpea()
	new UnitDefinition('hpea', 'hpea')
	..setShadowImageUnit("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_eaom()
	new BuildingDefinition('eaom', 'eaom')
	..setResearchesAvailable("Resi,R002,R003,R001,R000")
	..setUnitsTrained("e002,e004,edry")
	..setBuildTime(25)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setGoldCost(60)

	..setGroundTexture("")

	..setGroundTexture("")

	new BuildingDefinition('nfoh', 'nfoh')
	..setGroundTexture("")

	..setUnitsTrained("E003,Ekee")
	..setBuildTime(20)
	..setGoldCost(40)
	..setLumberCost(0)


@compiletime function create_w3u_edry()
	new UnitDefinition('edry', 'edry')
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)
	..setFoodCost(2)
	..setNormalAbilities("A003,Aien,Ault")
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(27)
	..setUpgradesUsed("R002,R001,Resw,Rerh,Resi,Reuv,Repm")
	..setBuildTime(3)
	..setSpeedBase(340)
	..setGoldCost(30)
	..setAbilitySkinList("A003,Aien,Ault")
	..setTooltipExtended("Basic long-ranged attacker. Can learn the Marksmanship and Impetus upgrades.|n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")
	..setButtonPositionX(1)

	new BuildingDefinition('eaoe', 'eaoe')
	..setBuildTime(30)
	..setRequirements("etoa")
	..setResearchesAvailable("R004,Redc,Rers,Rehs,Reeb")

	new UnitDefinition('esen', 'esen')
	..setGoldCost(40)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(900)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(30)

@compiletime function create_w3u_nwat()
	new UnitDefinition('nwat', 'nwat')
	..setNormalAbilities("Ashm,A008,Adis,Ahea")
	..setDefaultActiveAbility("Ahea")
	..setAttack1Range(400)
	..setAttack1AttackType("magic")
	..setAttack1DamageBase(14)
	..setAttack1ProjectileHomingEnabled(true)
	..setAttack1TargetsAllowed("air,debris,ground,item,structure,ward")
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(400)
	..setBuildTime(5)
	..setGoldCost(45)
	..setAbilitySkinList("A008,Adis,Ahea")
	..setAttack1ProjectileArt("Abilities\\Weapons\\PriestMissile\\PriestMissile.mdl")
	..setName("Cleric")
	..setDescription("Cleric")
	..setHotkey("Q")
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Cleric")
	..setTooltipExtended("The Cleric provides relief to those injured in battle also comes with dispel magic and siphon mana. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")


@compiletime function create_w3u_nssn()
	new UnitDefinition('nssn', 'nssn')
	..setNormalAbilities("Ashm,ACev,A00A,A009")
	..setAttack1DamageBase(20)
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(3)
	..setGoldCost(50)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setManaMaximum(200)
	..setManaInitialAmount(75)
	..setManaRegeneration(0.75)
	..setAbilitySkinList("ACev,A00A,A009")
	..setDescription("Warden")
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Warden")
	..setTooltipExtended("A mobile anti caster unit possesing Mana Burn, Blink, Evasion (15%) |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")
	..setHotkey("W")
	..setButtonPositionX(1)


@compiletime function create_w3u_ogru()
	new UnitDefinition('ogru', 'ogru')
	..setBuildTime(10)
	..setGoldCost(15)


@compiletime function create_w3u_nbwd()
	new BuildingDefinition('nbwd', 'nbwd')
	..setResearchesAvailable("Rema,R009")
	..setGoldCost(50)
	..setBuildTime(45)
	..setRepairGoldCost(50)
	..setRepairLumberCost(0)
	..setLumberCost(0)
	..setHotkey("R")
	..setTooltipBasic("Build Barrow Den")
	..setTooltipExtended("Upgrade facility, contains universal upgrades for Damage and Armor.")


@compiletime function create_w3u_eshd()
	new UnitDefinition('eshd', 'eshd')
	..setUpgradesUsed("Reib,Remk,R008,Reuv,R009,Rema")
	..setNormalAbilities("A006,Ashm")
	..setAbilitySkinList("Aeib,Aemk,A006,Ashm")
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Elite Archer")
	..setTooltipExtended("Battle hardened elite archers of the Sentinels they posses the same upgrades as normal Archers but much more deadly. Can use Viper stings a piercing nuke. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land and air units.|r")
	..setName("Elite Archer")


@compiletime function create_w3u_ehpr()
	new UnitDefinition('ehpr', 'ehpr')
	..setUpgradesUsed("Rema,R009,R008,Reib,Remk,Reht,Reuv")


@compiletime function create_w3u_Udre()
	new HeroDefinition('Udre', 'Udre')
	..setHeroAbilities("AM09")


@compiletime function create_w3u_x004()
	new UnitDefinition('x004', 'x004')
	..setModelFile("TyrandeWhisperwind.mdx")


@compiletime function create_w3u_edtm()
	new UnitDefinition('edtm', 'edtm')
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0n,Arav,Afa2,Ault")


@compiletime function create_w3u_Hblm()
	new HeroDefinition('Hblm', 'Hblm')
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0p")
	..setLevel(6)
	..setName("Ligga")


@compiletime function create_w3u_Ewar()
	new HeroDefinition('Ewar', 'Ewar')
	..setHeroAbilities("AM0w,AM0y,AM0z,AEsv")
